name: Microsemi Corporation
description: Microsemi Corporation was a prominent American provider of semiconductor and system solutions for the aerospace and defense, communications, data center, and industrial markets. The company specialized in high-performance and radiation-hardened analog mixed-signal integrated circuits, FPGAs, SoCs, and ASICs, as well as power management and timing products. Founded in 1960 and headquartered in Aliso Viejo, California, Microsemi established a reputation for reliability in mission-critical applications. In May 2018, Microsemi was acquired by Microchip Technology Inc. for approximately $10.3 billion, integrating its extensive portfolio into Microchip's broader semiconductor offerings.
